Q2 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

The shape factor for a tee-section with a 100 × 12 mm flange and 180 × 10 mm web as shown in figure should be _____ . (Correct upto two decimal places)
Assum yield stress fy = 250 MPa

 
NAT
Correct answer: 1.79
Solution

1.79 (1.75 - 1.85)

 
 
 
Q3 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A single unequal angle 100 × 75 × 6 is connected to a 10 mm thick gusset plate at the ends with six 16 mm diameter bolts to the long leg to transfer tension as shown in figure. What will be the block shear strength (in kN) of the angle section assuming that the yield and the ultimate stress of steel used are 250 MPa and 410 MPa respectively?

 
NAT
Correct answer: 198.73
Solution

198.73 (195 - 205)

 
Q4 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

What will be the maximum value of effective slenderness ratio as per IS 800 : 2007 for a tension member in which a reversal of direct stress occurs due to loads other than wind or seismic forces?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

 
Q5 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A welded plate girder is provided with various stiffeners. If size of web plate is 2000 mm × 10 mm, spacing of vertical stiffener is 1000 mm, then minimum moment of inertia required for transverse stiffener is __________ × 104 mm4.

NAT
Correct answer: 1200
Solution

1200 (1198 - 1202)

 
Q6 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A fillet welded joint of 8 mm size is shown in the figure. The permissible stress in the weld is 108 MPa. The maximum load that can be transmitted by the joint is ____________ kN. (Answer upto two decimal places)

 
NAT
Correct answer: 350.78
Solution

350.78 (348 - 354)

A load P is supported by a cantilever beam resting on a simply supported beam as shown in the figure. If the plastic moment capacity of simply supported beam is one third of the cantilever beam then the true collapse load will be:

 
Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

 
Q9 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

What will be the efficiency of a joint for which design strength of joint in double shear is 619.89 kN, design strength in bearing is 995.97 kN, net strength of plate is 840.13 kN and design gross strength of solid plate is 727.27 kN?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(c)

 
Q10 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The wind pressure at a height of 12 m for basic wind speed of 47 m/s is____ (in kN/m2, correct upto two decimal places)
Take, value of risk coefficient (k1) = 1.0.
Terrain, height and structural size factor (k2) = 0.92.
Topography factor (k3) = 1.0
Importance factor for cyclonic region (k4) = 1.15

NAT
Correct answer: 1.48
Solution

1.48 (1.45 - 1.53)

Q17 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A simply supported beam of length (10 + 2a) meters has supports 10 m apart with an overhang ‘a’ over each support. The beam is carries uniformly distributed load 40 kN/m. If the overhang and the span between the supports collapse simultaneously, then which of the following option(s) is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, c)
